meaning: n.天鹅,杰出的诗人、歌手,天鹅座
examples: The team's mascot is a giant swan.
The swan flapped its wings noisily.
'Swan Lake' is one of the great classical ballets.
Just as Baier was mulling over what to do, Nasdaq began its swan dive.
Swan Hotel is a 15th-century former coaching inn in Wells, in the shadow of the cathedral.
